model.description: The source for sleep data. Value can be 16 for a tracker or 32 for a Sleep Monitor.

| Value | Description|
|---|---|
|60 | Aura Dock|
|61 | Aura Sensor|
|63 | Aura Sensor V2|
|51 | Pulse|
|52 | Activite|
|53 | Activite (Pop, Steel)|
|54 | Withings Go|
|55 | Activite Steel HR|
|59 | Activite Steel HR Sport Edition|
|58 | Pulse HR|

startdate.description: The starting datetime for the sleep state data.

enddate.description: The end datetime for the sleep data. A single call can span up to 7 days maximum. To cover a wider time range, you will need to perform multiple calls.

date.description: Date at which the measure was taken or entered.

modified.description: The timestamp of the last modification.

hash_deviceid.description: ID of device that tracked the data. To retrieve information about this device, refer to : User v2 - Getdevice.

total_timeinbed.description: Total time spent in bed (seconds). *(Use 'data_fields' to request this data.)*

total_sleep_time.description: Total time spent asleep. Sum of light, deep and rem durations (seconds). *(Use 'data_fields' to request this data.)*

asleepduration.description:
Duration of sleep when night comes from external source (seconds).
Light, Deep and Rem sleep durations are null in this case. *(Use 'data_fields' to request this data.)*

lightsleepduration.description: Duration in state light sleep (seconds). *(Use 'data_fields' to request this data.)*

remsleepduration.description: Duration in state REM sleep (seconds). *(Use 'data_fields' to request this data.)*

deepsleepduration.description: Duration in state deep sleep (seconds). *(Use 'data_fields' to request this data.)*

sleep_efficiency.description: Ratio of the total sleep time over the time spent in bed. *(Use 'data_fields' to request this data.)*

sleep_latency.description: Time spent in bed before falling asleep (seconds). *(Use 'data_fields' to request this data.)*

wakeup_latency.description: Time spent in bed after waking up (seconds). *(Use 'data_fields' to request this data.)*

wakeupduration.description: Time spent awake (seconds). *(Use 'data_fields' to request this data.)*

wakeupcount.description: Number of times the user woke up while in bed. Does not include the number of times the user got out of bed. *(Use 'data_fields' to request this data.)*

waso.description: Time spent awake in bed after falling asleep for the 1st time during the night (seconds). *(Use 'data_fields' to request this data.)*

nb_rem_episodes.description: Count of the REM sleep phases. *(Use 'data_fields' to request this data.)*

durationtosleep.description: Time to sleep (seconds). (deprecated) *(Use 'data_fields' to request this data.)*

durationtowakeup.description: Time to wake up (seconds). (deprecated) *(Use 'data_fields' to request this data.)*

out_of_bed_count.description: Number of times the user got out of bed during the night. *(Use 'data_fields' to request this data.)*

hr_average.description: Average heart rate. (beats per minute).*(Use 'data_fields' to request this data.)*

hr_min.description: Minimal heart rate (beats per minute). *(Use 'data_fields' to request this data.)*

hr_max.description: Maximal heart rate (beats per minute).. *(Use 'data_fields' to request this data.)*

rr_average.description: Average respiration rate (breaths per minute).  *(Use 'data_fields' to request this data.)*

rr_min.description: Minimal respiration rate (breaths per minute). *(Use 'data_fields' to request this data.)*

rr_max.description: Maximal respiration rate (breaths per minute). *(Use 'data_fields' to request this data.)*

breathing_quality_assessment.description:
Intensity of breathing disturbances.
Available for all Sleep and Sleep Analyzer devices (wellness metric).

breathing_disturbances_intensity.description:
Intensity of breathing disturbances.
Available for all Sleep and Sleep Analyzer devices (wellness metric).

snoringepisodecount.description: Numbers of snoring episodes of at least one minute.

night_events.description:
Summary of sleep events that happened during the sleep activity. It is structured as a dictionary, where keys are the type of event, and the value is an array of timestamps relative to the activity startdate. Types of events can be one of the following :
ValueDescription
1got in bed
2fell asleep
3woke up
4got out of bed
5start of asleep period that was manually input
6start of awake period that was manually input

apnea_hypopnea_index.description:
Medical grade AHI. Average number of hypopnea and apnea episodes per hour, that occured during sleep time.
Only available for devices purchased in Europe and Australia, with the sleep apnea detection feature activated.

mvt_score_avg.description: Track the average movement score in bed throughout the night. The score ranges from 0 to 255, representing the intensity of movement. This metric is only available for Sleep Analyzer devices in the EU and prescription-based devices in the US (Sleep Rx).

mvt_active_duration.description: Track the duration (in seconds) of movement in bed. Only available for Sleep Analyzer devices (EU) and devices under prescriptions in the US (Sleep Rx)

chest_movement_rate_wellness_average.description: Average respiration rate (breaths per minute).  *(Use 'data_fields' to request this data.)*

chest_movement_rate_wellness_min.description: Minimal respiration rate (breaths per minute). *(Use 'data_fields' to request this data.)*

chest_movement_rate_wellness_max.description: Maximal respiration rate (breaths per minute). *(Use 'data_fields' to request this data.)*

withings_index.description:
Withings Sleep Rx (FDA Cleared) allows to estimate gaps in breathing sounds and to generate an index. This index corresponds to the number of breathing events per hour.
ValueDescription
0-15 (events per hour on average)No/Mild
15-30 (events per hour on average)Moderate
> 30 (events per hour on average)Severe
Note: 5 hours of sleep are required in order to calculate the Withings Index.

breathing_sounds.description: Total time when breathing sounds were tracked. (seconds) *(Use 'data_fields' to request this data.)*

breathing_sounds_episode_count.description: Numbers of breathing sounds episodes of at least one minute. *(Use 'data_fields' to request this data.)*

chest_movement_rate_average.description: Average chest movement rate (events per minute). *(Use 'data_fields' to request this data.)*

chest_movement_rate_min.description: Minimal chest movement rate (events per minute). *(Use 'data_fields' to request this data.)*

chest_movement_rate_max.description: Maximal chest movement rate (events per minute). *(Use 'data_fields' to request this data.)*

core_body_temperature_min.description: Minimal core body temperature (in celsius degrees). *(Use 'data_fields' to request this data.)*

core_body_temperature_max.description: Maximal core body temperature (in celsius degrees). *(Use 'data_fields' to request this data.)*

core_body_temperature_avg.description: Avenage core body temperature (in celsius degrees). *(Use 'data_fields' to request this data.)*

core_body_temperature_status.description:
Status of the temperature. *(Use 'data_fields' to request this data)* Value can be: 'unknown', 'usual' or 'elevated'.
 

| Value|
|---|
|unknown|
|usual|
|elevated|
